db.title: History Cleanup Settings
db.exportDesc: Download the current SQLite database backup file.
db.importWarning: Importing will overwrite all existing data. This is irreversible! Please ensure you have a backup.
db.importConfirm: ⚠️ Importing will overwrite existing data. Continue?
db.backupPathDesc: Set the server-side backup directory (for Docker, use container path e.g. /app/backups).
db.backupScheduleDesc: Automatically backup the database at the configured path. Backup path must be set first.
db.dataCleanupDesc: Conversation records beyond the retention period will be deleted. Sensitive conversations can be kept longer for auditing.
db.cleanupSettingsSaved: Cleanup settings saved, scheduled daily at {{hour}}:00
db.cleanupConfirm:
Clear conversation data beyond the retention period?
Normal: {{retentionDays}} days, Sensitive: {{sensitiveDays}} days.

llm.title: LLM Model Settings
llm.ociNote: OCI credentials are stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM.

vertexHint.title: 💡 Gemini auth is controlled by GEMINI_PROVIDER in server .env:
vertexHint.body:
• studio (AI Studio): uses this API Key or env GEMINI_API_KEY
• vertex (Vertex AI enterprise): ignores this field, uses GCP Service Account
Unsupported model names auto-alias (e.g. gemini-3-*-preview → gemini-2.5-*)

notes.gemini: API Key can be left blank to use env GEMINI_API_KEY; if filled, it is encrypted in DB and takes priority
notes.azure: Fill in base URL (e.g. https://fl-aoai-eus.openai.azure.com), the SDK will automatically build the full path
notes.oci: Uses RSA-SHA256 signature authentication, Private Key PEM encrypted in DB. Model role can be Chat / Embedding / Rerank
notes.roles: Chat for conversation, Embedding/Rerank for KB retrieval, TTS for text-to-speech, STT for speech-to-text
notes.encryption: Stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM in DB, decrypted server-side, never displayed in plaintext on frontend

form.azureEndpointNote: Base URL only, do not include /openai/deployments/...
form.cohereModelNote: Enter Cohere model name, e.g. embed-multilingual-v3.0
form.compartmentNote: Optional, leave blank to use tenancy root
form.ociEncryptNote: OCI credentials are encrypted with AES-256-GCM in DB.
form.ociKeepNote: Leave blank to keep existing settings
form.keepExisting: Leave blank to keep existing value
form.keepExistingKey: Leave blank to keep existing key
form.keepPrivateKey: Leave blank to keep existing Private Key

skills.importFailed: Import failed, please check the link
skills.emptyHint: No skills yet. Click "Create Skill" to get started
skills.tagPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter

skills.codeRunnerHint: After saving, go to the "Code Runners" tab in admin to start this Skill. The handler must export an async function returning { system_prompt } or { content }.
skills.toolSchemaHint: Once defined, the LLM will auto-detect when to call this skill
skills.outputSchemaHint: JSON Schema — the LLM will output in this format
skills.outputTemplateHint: When selected, the AI will output JSON and apply this template to generate files
skills.endpointModePostAnswer: Post-process (call after LLM responds, for TTS etc.)
skills.viewNeedDevPerm: Developer permission required to view code and settings

codeRunners.empty: No code skills yet. Create one in the Skill Market.
codeRunners.installHint: Confirm or modify packages to install. You can add packages not specified during skill creation.
codeRunners.installEmptyHint: (Only install express wrapper, no other packages)
codeRunners.installPkgPlaceholder: Type package name and press Enter, e.g. axios

adminOverride.title: Admin Test Mode
adminOverride.triggerTitle: Admin test mode — add unauthorized tools
adminOverride.allAuthorized: All tools are authorized, no test mode needed

kb.deleteConfirm: Delete knowledge base "{{name}}"? All documents and vector data will be deleted.
kb.noKbCanCreate: No knowledge bases yet. Click "Create Knowledge Base" to start.

createModal.title: Create Knowledge Base
createModal.descPlaceholder: Describe the purpose and scope of this knowledge base
createModal.dimHint: 💡 Dimensions cannot be changed after creation. 768 fits most cases; choose 1536 or 3072 for higher semantic precision (model support required).
createModal.nameRequired: Please enter a knowledge base name

docs.dropZoneText: Drag or click to upload documents
docs.dropZoneHint: Supports PDF · DOCX/DOC · PPTX/PPT · XLSX/XLS · TXT · CSV · JPG · PNG · GIF · WEBP (max 200 MB)
docs.deleteConfirm: Delete document "{{name}}" and all its chunks?

settings.strategyRegularDesc: Advanced text chunking mode with consistent rules for retrieval and summarization
settings.strategyParentChildDesc: Uses parent-child mode: child-chunks for retrieval, parent-chunks for full context
settings.removeUrls: Remove all URLs and email addresses
settings.modeVectorDesc: Finds text segments most similar via embedding vectors
settings.modeFulltextDesc: Indexes all words to allow arbitrary keyword queries
settings.modeHybridDesc: Runs full-text and vector search simultaneously with reranking
settings.rerankAutoNote: When "Auto" is selected, the system uses an active rerank model automatically.
settings.ocrModelNote: Gemini model used for PDF full-text understanding and embedded image OCR in Word/Excel/PPT.
settings.parseModeNote: Applies to PDF · DOCX · XLSX. PPTX and images are always text-only. Can be overridden per upload.
settings.pdfOcrNote: Applies to PDF only. Auto detects images per page (≥5% area) and OCRs only those pages; pure scanned PDFs auto-escalate to full OCR. Force OCRs every page (slower).

pdfOcr.offDesc: Extract embedded text layer only, fastest. May miss text inside images.
pdfOcr.autoDesc: OCR only pages that contain images; others use text layer. Recommended.
pdfOcr.forceDesc: OCR every page. Use for scanned docs or when text layer is unreliable.

settings.reparseAllConfirm: Settings changed. Re-parse all {{count}} documents in this KB with the new settings?
settings.reparseAllQueued: Queued {{count}} documents for re-parse (running in background)

share.requestPublicDesc: Once public, all users can search this knowledge base
share.requestPublicConfirm: Request to make this knowledge base public? It requires admin approval.
share.userSearchPlaceholder: Search by name / account / employee ID
share.permDesc: Use: Can call this KB in conversations but not visible in the KB market. Edit: Visible in KB market, can view and edit documents.

search.title: Recall Test
search.subtitle: Test retrieval effectiveness based on a query text
search.placeholder: Enter text, preferably a short declarative sentence.

history.hint: Showing last 100 records (chat queries and recall tests)

form.mp3Note: MP3 Voice: AI response will be automatically converted to audio via TTS skill. Requires TTS model (model_role=tts) configured in admin.

scheduledTask.promptHint: Type / to quickly select tools, or go to the Tools tab to insert syntax.

tools.hint: Click Insert to add syntax to the Prompt (at cursor). Skills/KBs will be called automatically at execution time and results injected into the Prompt for AI analysis.

emailDefault.subject: Scheduled task completed: {{tn}} ({{d}})
emailDefault.body:
Hello,

The execution result of scheduled task "{{tn}}" on {{d}} ({{wd}}):

{{ar}}

See attachments if any.

Cortex

outputTemplate.label: Output Template (optional)
outputTemplate.helpPrefix: After selection, AI will output JSON based on template variable schema and the system auto-fills the template. You can also reference it in the Prompt with

pipeline.description: After the main AI analysis, the following nodes run in order. Each node receives the previous node's output and supports skills, MCP, knowledge bases, additional AI analysis, and conditional branching.
pipeline.emptyHint: No post-processing nodes yet. Click "Add Node" above to start building the pipeline.

generateFile.jsonHint: Must be JSON. Keys should match template variables.

conditionNode.aiPromptPlaceholder: Does this contain negative financial information?

parallelNode.hint: Select nodes to run in parallel (they won't run again afterwards).

mcp.title: MCP Server Management
mcp.desc: Configure Model Context Protocol servers to enable AI tool calls
mcp.subtitle: Configure Model Context Protocol servers to enable AI tool calls
mcp.noToolsSynced: No tools synced yet, click the sync button

form.name: Name *
form.apiKeyPlaceholder: Bearer token, leave blank for no auth
form.modeInjectDesc: MCP tool results injected to LLM for summarized response
form.modeAnswerDesc: MCP tool results output directly, bypassing LLM (raw data preserved)
form.injectDesc: MCP tool results injected to LLM for summarized response
form.answerDesc: MCP tool results output directly, bypassing LLM (raw data preserved)
form.transportAuto: Try each transport in order and remember the one that works
form.transportHttpPost: Direct POST JSON-RPC to URL (most universal)
form.transportHttpSse: GET /sse for SSE connection, POST /message for requests (legacy MCP)
form.transportStreamable: Single POST endpoint, response can be JSON or SSE (MCP 2025 spec)
form.transportStdio: Spawn local subprocess, communicate via stdin/stdout (local MCP)
form.commandHint: Full command, quote arguments with spaces
form.isPublic: Public (requires Admin approval to be visible to all users)
form.commandRequired: Command is required for stdio mode
form.sendUserTokenHint: When enabled, calls to this MCP server include an RS256 JWT header containing email / employee ID / dept (5-minute expiry). The MCP side must verify with the public key before making data-permission decisions.
form.downloadPublicKeyHint: Send this .pem to your MCP team — they use it to verify X-User-Token.
form.testTokenDesc: Share this with your MCP team to verify their integration — their verifier should decode the claims below.
form.publicKeyNotConfigured: Server has no JWT public key configured (MCP_JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH)
form.privateKeyNotConfigured: Server has no JWT private key configured — cannot sign tokens

roles.title: Role Management
roles.noRoles: No roles yet, click Add Role

form.setDefault: Set as default role (auto-applied to new users, unique system-wide)
form.allowCodeSkill: Allow Code Runner Skill (IT dept only)
form.dataPolicyNote: Once applied, users in this role will have their data queries filtered by policy rules
form.budgetNote: Period is current day/Mon-Sun/current month. User personal settings override role settings. Admins are unlimited.

roles.deleteConfirm: Delete role "{{name}}"? Users assigned this role will be unbound.

tpl.title: Document Templates
tpl.subtitle: Upload documents, AI identifies variables, reusable and shareable
tpl.empty: No templates yet. Click "New Template" to upload your first document.

basic.name: Template Name
basic.tagPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
basic.fixedFormatHint: Fixed format mode enabled: each cell will apply font/color/overflow settings from the "Style" tab during generation. For DOCX, you can also set fixed row height via docx_style.rowHeightPt on loop variables.

tpl.styleNote: When fixed format mode is off, PDF overlay paths won't apply detected styles, but manual Override settings (font size, color, bold) will still be applied to generated documents.
tpl.layoutNote: On the PDF preview below, first select a variable from the dropdown at top-right, then drag to draw a box to define the field position. Positioned fields will be overlaid onto the original PDF during generation.
tpl.ocrTitle: Use Gemini Vision to re-OCR scan this PDF and auto-fill field coordinates

card.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

generate.subtitle: Fill in variables to generate document
generate.noVariables: This template has no variables to fill in

upload.title: New Document Template
upload.formatError: Only DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, PDF formats are supported
upload.dropHint: Drag and drop file here, or click to select
upload.formatHint: Supports DOCX / XLSX / PPTX / PDF, max 50MB
upload.ocrFixedHint: Fixed format mode enabled. Please verify field coordinates in the Layout Editor.
upload.publicConfirm:
Are you sure you want to make this template public?

Once public, all users can:
• Browse this template's content and variables
• Use this template to generate documents
• Duplicate this template as their own copy
upload.pptxThumbnailHint: After creation, you can upload preview thumbnails for each slide in the template editor.

share.title: Share Settings: {{name}}
share.searchUser: Search by name or employee ID
share.publicDesc: All users can browse, use, and duplicate this template
share.publicConfirm:
Are you sure you want to make this template public?

Once public, all users can:
• Browse this template's content and variables
• Use this template to generate documents
• Duplicate this template as their own copy
share.unpublicConfirm:
Are you sure you want to unpublish this template?

After unpublishing, only shared users can continue using it.
Existing copies are not affected.

vars.loopModeTitle: Loop mode: table row insert or formatted text fill
vars.aiRewriteOn: Currently: AI can modify this field (click to disable)
vars.aiRewriteOff: Currently: preserve original text, AI cannot rewrite (click to enable)
vars.docxSyntaxDesc: Type the following tags directly in the Word template. They will be auto-replaced during generation, no original_text detection needed:
vars.docxTableLoopHint: Table row loop: place {#key} in the first cell and {/key} in the last cell of a row, the entire row will auto-repeat.

style.footerHint: "Detected" means auto-read from original template. Blank fields use detected values. After manual settings, click "Reset" to restore. Override font/color/bold settings also apply in non-fixed format mode.

pdf.selectVarHint: Select variable then drag to draw:
pdf.anchorFloatHint: When preceding fields overflow, this field moves to the extension page
pdf.anchorFixedHint: Overflow content extends to next page, position stays fixed
pdf.notPositioned: Not positioned. Drag to draw a box on the left.

pptx.saveFirstHint: Please create the template first before uploading thumbnails
pptx.noLoopVarHint: Please add a loop type variable in the variable list first
pptx.thumbnailHintAfterCreate: After creating the template, you can upload preview thumbnails for each slide.

xlsx.colorHint: Colors apply to loop variable data rows. Header row keeps original template style.
